crime.value: Murder of Caylor's mother in staged car accident, attempted murder of Caylor
crime.quote: Dad had killed Mum in an attempt to create the perfect family with Mrs. Jane

victim.value: Caylor's mother, killed because she stood in the way of her husband's desire for a new family with Mrs. Jane
victim.quote: Dad had killed Mum in an attempt to create the perfect family with Mrs. Jane

closed_world.value: The small town of Linkin Park and the lake area where the family had connections through engineering work
closed_world.quote: Kranie's dad had been an engineer who had helped my mom and Mrs. Jane build their many experiments

culprit_and_motive.value: Caylor's father killed her mother to start a new family with Mrs. Jane, who was complicit in the murder plot
culprit_and_motive.quote: Dad had killed Mum in an attempt to create the perfect family with Mrs. Jane, and Mrs. Jane had let him

resolution.value: Caylor overhears the murderers planning to kill Kranie and warns everyone, exposing the truth
resolution.quote: I jumped up really fast and ran with all my might to the house to warn everybody

investigator.value: Caylor, the victim's daughter and survivor of the staged accident, who uncovers the truth about her parents' deaths
investigator.quote: It all made sense, more this time than the last... My dad had framed Kranie

suspect_architecture.value: Three main suspects with clear motives: Dad (fake death, romantic motive with Mrs. Jane), Mrs. Jane (complicit in murder for love), Kranie (falsely framed as perpetrator)
suspect_architecture.quote: My dad had framed Kranie, and he had used Anora's own insanity to do it.

red_herring.value: Ghost manifestations and supernatural folklore used to conceal mundane murder plot - the 'ghosts' are actually the living perpetrators
red_herring.quote: We could not reach an agreement on why there might be a ghost in Linkin Park.

clue_fairness.value: Pig squealing mentioned early as unexplained detail, later revealed as evidence of Dad's escape from car crash
clue_fairness.quote: Forget the pigs, they got what they deserved, almost ruining my plan with all that squealing

social_world.value: Guardian-ward power dynamic where Kranie's protective authority over Caylor is exploited by the real perpetrators
social_world.quote: Kranie Morny, who had been driving behind us that night, was now my legal guardian.

alibi.value: Dad's presumed death in car crash serves as ultimate alibi - he's not suspected because he's believed to be dead
alibi.quote: my dad's body was not found

reveal_mechanic.value: Eavesdropping on conspiracy conversation reveals the true plot and Dad's survival
reveal_mechanic.quote: It all made sense, more this time than the last... My dad had framed Kranie

media_and_audience.value: Local ghost folklore and community supernatural beliefs used to mask and explain the criminal activity
media_and_audience.quote: The ghost just strolls around town chanting this stuff?

investigator_wound.value: Caylor's trauma from losing parents in the crash makes her vulnerable to trusting the very people who orchestrated it
investigator_wound.quote: The crash took my parents, but Kranie , my godmother, adopted me rather quickly.
